name: @openwop/openwop-host-wasm-sandbox
description: Reference WASM-isolation OpenWOP host implementing the RFC 0035 sandbox execution contract. Executes pack-loaded typeIds as WebAssembly modules with real capability-gated imports, an engine-enforced memory bound, and a worker-thread wall-clock kill-timer — the real-isolation reference that graduates the node-pack-sandbox-* invariants to protocol tier.
